nasb.text: And he captured a youth from Succoth and questioned him. Then the youth wrote down for him the princes of Succoth and its elders, seventy-seven men.

esv.text: And he captured a young man of Succoth and questioned him. And he wrote down for him the officials and elders of Succoth, seventy-seven men.

cnv.text: 捉住了疏割人中的一個青年人，查問他；他就把疏割的首領和長老的名字寫給他，共七十七人。

ccb.text: 抓住一个疏割的青年，问他疏割的首领和长老是谁，他就写下疏割七十七位首领和长老的名字。
